200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Event: Spring Festival 2025

Event date: 01/03/2025

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the Archivist is surrounded by a protective aura for 5 sec. The aura affects a small radius around the unit. Archivist and all allies in the aura's range take 50% less damage and restore 7% health every second.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Archivist is surrounded by a protective aura for 5 sec. The aura affects a small radius around the unit. Archivist and all allies in the aura's range take 60% less damage and restore 10% health every second. Once in a while, the Archivist lights a candle near themself and 2 random allies for 5 sec. The following effect apply to units that have a candle lit near them: - While the candle is active, they restore 10% health every second. - Removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, and fear and makes the unit immune to those effects for 5 sec. - They gain a shield that absorbs 1000000 damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Archivist is surrounded by a protective aura for 5 sec. The aura affects a small radius around the unit. Archivist and all allies in the aura's range take 70% less damage and restore 15% health every second. Once in a while, the Archivist lights a candle near themself and 2 random allies for 5 sec. The following effect apply to units that have a candle lit near them: - While the candle is active, they restore 15% health every second. - Removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, and fear and makes the unit immune to those effects for 5 sec. - They gain a shield that absorbs 1300000 damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec. Once in a while Archivist resurrects 3 random allies with 35% health. When any unit on the battlefield is resurrected, one of the following effects is triggered: If an ally is resurrected, the Archivist enhances it. An enhanced unit restores 30% health, has increased physical and magic armor, fortitude, and incoming healing by 50% for 5 sec. Stack up to 3 times. Also, enhanced unit restores 400000 health for 5 sec. - If an enemy is resurrected, the Archivist summons a spiky vine that entangles the resurrected enemy. For 5 sec, they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). Also, exhaustion is applied to the affected unit every second while the effect is active. Each second, the target takes physical damage equal to 100% of the Archivist's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 15%. The exhaustion lasts for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Every second a magic arrow flies out of Archivist and each ally in the aura's range to a random enemy. On hit, the arrow deals magic damage equal to 10% of the target's max health and has a 30% chance to stun it for 1.5 sec.

description 4/6

Every second a magic arrow flies out of Archivist and each ally in the aura's range to a random enemy. On hit, the arrow deals magic damage equal to 10% of the target's max health and has a 30% chance to stun it for 1.5 sec. The archivist also lights magic candles next to 2 random enemies and starts to incinerate them for 5 sec. the incinerated enemies take 120000 pure damage every second for 5 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated units take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health and fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor, are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

description 6/6

Every second a magic arrow flies out of Archivist and each ally in the aura's range to a random enemy. On hit, the arrow deals magic damage equal to 10% of the target's max health and has a 30% chance to stun it for 1.5 sec. The archivist also lights magic candles next to 2 random enemies and starts to incinerate them for 5 sec. the incinerated enemies take 120000 pure damage every second for 5 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated units take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health and fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor, are reduced by 35% for 3 sec. When the spiky vine from a set ability wraps around a resurrected enemy, it also has a 50% chance to entangle each enemy in a small radius around the resurrected unit. For 5 sec, they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). Also, exhaustion is applied to the affected unit every second while the effect is active. Each second, the target takes physical damage equal to 100% of the Archivist's attack. While an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 15%. The exhaustion lasts for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range also their fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor increased by 35%.

description 4/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range also their fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor increased by 35%. The units that have a candle lit near them also go into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 15% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range also their fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor increased by 35%. The units that have a candle lit near them also go into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 15% for 5 sec. When an ally is resurrected, they cannot be set on fire, frozen, incinerated, or electrified for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range have their spell power and magic armor piercing increased by 35%.

description 4/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range have their spell power and magic armor piercing increased by 35%. The Archivist also lights magic candles next to 2 random enemies and applies exhaustion to them for 5 sec. During this time, the fatigued unit cannot gain shields or effects that reduce or absorb incoming damage. The fatigued unit's damage and attack speed are reduced by 45% for 5 sec. Additionally, the cooldown time of the fatigued unit's weapon, armor, artifact, ring, totem, and amulet abilities is increased by 3 sec.

description 6/6

Archivist and all allies in the aura's range have their spell power and magic armor piercing increased by 35%. The Archivist also lights magic candles next to 2 random enemies and applies exhaustion to them for 5 sec. During this time, the fatigued unit cannot gain shields or effects that reduce or absorb incoming damage. The fatigued unit's damage and attack speed are reduced by 45% for 5 sec. Additionally, the cooldown time of the fatigued unit's weapon, armor, artifact, ring, totem, and amulet abilities is increased by 3 sec. When any unit on the battlefield is resurrected, the Archivist increases all of its stats by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Materials

Flame of Knowledge
Fashionable Glasses
Multipurpose Tape
Archivist Handkerchief
Chronicle
Suggested gears for the set
